The '''69th annual [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' took place from 7 to 17 February 2019.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://teddyaward.tv/en/teddy/|title=33. TEDDY AWARD - SAVE THE DATE.|access-date=7 December 2018}}</ref> French actress [[Juliette Binoche]] served as the Jury President.

[[Lone Scherfig]]'s drama film ''[[The Kindness of Strangers (film)|The Kindness of Strangers]]'' opened the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/lone-scherfigs-kindness-strangers-open-2019-berlin-film-festival-1166934|title=Lone Scherfig's 'The Kindness of Strangers' to Open 2019 Berlin Film Festival|last=Roxborough|first=Scott|work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]|date=6 December 2018|access-date=7 December 2018}}</ref> The [[Golden Bear]] was won by Israeli-French drama ''[[Synonyms (film)|Synonyms]]'' directed by [[Nadav Lapid]], which also served as the closing film of the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2019/film/news/berlin-film-festival-2019-award-winners-1203141753/ |title=Berlin Film Festival 2019: Nadav Lapid's 'Synonyms' Wins Golden Bear |work=Variety |date=16 February 2019 |access-date=17 February 2019}}</ref>

==Juries==
[[File:MJK 38930 Jury of the 2019 Berlin International Film Festival.jpg|thumb|Main competition jury at the closing ceremony at Berlinale 2019 (from left to right): [[Sebastián Lelio]], [[Juliette Binoche]], Rajendra Roy, [[Trudie Styler]], [[Justin Chang]], and [[Sandra Hüller]]]]

===Main competition===
* [[Juliette Binoche]], French actress - Jury President<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.indiewire.com/2018/12/juliette-binoche-jury-president-2019-berlin-film-festival-1202027082/|title=Juliette Binoche to Serve as Jury President of 2019 Berlin Film Festival|last=Sharf|first=Zack|work=[[IndieWire]]|date=11 December 2018|access-date=11 December 2018}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/berlin-film-festival-unveils-2019-competition-jury-1180548|title=Berlin Film Festival Unveils Competition Jury|last=Roxborough|first=Scott|work=[[The Hollywood Reporter]]|date=29 January 2019|access-date=29 January 2019}}</ref>
* [[Justin Chang]], American journalist and film critic
* [[Sandra Hüller]], German actress
* [[Sebastián Lelio]], Chilean film director and screenwriter
* Rajendra Roy, American chief curator of [[Museum of Modern Art|MoMA]]
* [[Trudie Styler]], British actress, producer and film director

===First Feature Award Jury===
* [[Katja Eichinger]], German journalist, writer and film producer<ref name="Cineuropa">{{cite web|url=https://cineuropa.org/en/newsdetail/366551/|title=Juliette Binoche's Berlinale jury members are all present and correct|date=29 January 2019|access-date=18 February 2019}}</ref>
* [[Alain Gomis]], French filmmaker
* [[Vivian Qu]], Chinese filmmaker and producer

===Documentary Award Jury===
* Maria Bonsanti, Italian artistic director and director of the [[Eurodoc]] program<ref name="Cineuropa" />
* [[Gregory Nava]], American film director, screenwriter and producer
* [[Maria Ramos (filmmaker)|Maria Ramos]], Brazilian film director

===International Short Film Jury===
* Jeffrey Bowers, American curator<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/de/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_kurzfilmjury/index.html|title=INTERNATIONALE KURZFILMJURY (INTERNATIONAL SHORT FILM JURY)|date=21 December 2018|access-date=1 January 2019}}</ref>
* Vanja Kaludjercic, Croatian programmer and purchasing director of [[MUBI]]
* [[Koyo Kouoh]], Cameroonian author, curator and artistic director of RAW Material Company

==Official Sections==

== Official Awards ==
[[File:MJK 339221 Goldener Bär für Synonyms.jpg|thumb|Nadav Lapid with Golden Bear at the closing ceremony at Berlinale 2019]]
The following prizes were awarded:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_unabh_ngigen_jurys/index.html|title=PRIZES OF THE INDEPENDENT JURIES|access-date=16 February 2019|archive-date=30 August 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170830235433/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_unabh_ngigen_jurys/index.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_52308.html|title=BERLINALE 2019: THE PANORAMA AUDIENCE AWARDS GO TO 37 SECONDS AND TALKING ABOUT TREES|date=16 February 2019|access-date=16 February 2019|archive-date=17 February 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190217030316/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_52308.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_generation/index.html|title=AWARDS AND JURIES IN THE GENERATION SECTION|access-date=16 February 2019}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Synonyms (film)|Synonyms]]'' by [[Nadav Lapid]]
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[By the Grace of God (film)|By the Grace of God]]'' by [[François Ozon]]
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''[[System Crasher]]'' by [[Nora Fingscheidt]]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Angela Schanelec]] for ''[[I Was at Home, But]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Yong Mei]] for ''[[So Long, My Son]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Wang Jingchun]] for ''[[So Long, My Son]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: Maurizio Braucci, [[Claudio Giovannesi]] and [[Roberto Saviano]] for ''[[Piranhas (2019 film)|Piranhas]]''
* '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': [[Rasmus Videbæk]] for ''[[Out Stealing Horses (film)|Out Stealing Horses]]'' (Cinematography)

=== [[Golden Bear for Best Short Film]] ===
* ''Umbra'' by [[Florian Fischer]] and Johannes Krell

=== Panorama ===

==== Panorama Audience Award ====
* '''1st Place''': ''[[37 Seconds]]'' by Hikari
* '''2nd Place''': ''[[Stitches (2019 film)|Stitches]]'' by Miroslav Terzić
* '''3rd Place''': ''[[Buoyancy (film)|Buoyancy]]'' by [[Rodd Rathjen]]

==== Panorama Audience Award – Documentaries ====
* '''1st Place''': ''[[Talking About Trees]]'' by [[Suhaib Gasmelbari]]
* '''2nd Place''': ''[[Midnight Traveler]]'' by Hassan Fazili and Emelie Mahdavian
* '''3rd Place''': ''[[Shooting the Mafia]]'' by [[Kim Longinotto]]

=== Generation ===

==== Generation 14Plus ====

* '''Crystal Bear for Best Film''': ''[[Stupid Young Heart]]'' by [[Selma Vilhunen]]
** '''Special Mention''': ''[[We Are Little Zombies]]'' by Makoto Nagahisa
* '''Crystal Bear for Best Short Film''': ''Tattoo'' by Farhad Delaram
** '''Special Mention''': ''Four Quartets'' by [[Marco Alessi]]

==== Generation KPlus ====

* '''Grand Prix of the Generation 14plus International Jury for the Best Film''': ''[[House of Hummingbird]]'' by [[Kim Bo-ra]]
** '''Special Mention:''' ''[[Bulbul Can Sing]]'' by [[Rima Das]]
* '''Special Prize of the Generation 14plus International Jury for the Best Short Film''': ''Liberty'' by [[Faren Humes]]
** '''Special Mention''': ''The Jarariju Sisters'' by Jorge Cadena

== Independent Awards ==

=== [[Teddy Award]] ===
* '''Best Feature Film''': ''[[Brief Story from the Green Planet]]'' by [[Santiago Loza]]
* '''Best Documentary/Essay Film''': ''[[Lemebel]]'' by Joanna Reposi Garibaldi
* '''Best Short Film''': ''Entropia'' by [[Flóra Anna Buda]]
* '''Special Jury Award''': ''[[A Dog Barking at the Moon]]'' by Xiang Zi
* '''Special Teddy Award''': [[Falk Richter]]
* '''TEDDY Readers’ Award Powered by QUEER.DE''': ''[[Brief Story from the Green Planet]]'' by [[Santiago Loza]]

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics|FIPRESCI Prize]] ===
* '''Competition''': ''[[Synonyms (film)|Synonyms]]'' by [[Nadav Lapid]]
* '''Panorama''': ''Dafne'' by Federico Bondi
* '''Forum''': ''[[Die Kinder der Toten]]'' by Kelly Copper and Pavol Liska

=== [[Prize of the Ecumenical Jury]] ===
* '''Competition''': ''[[God Exists, Her Name Is Petrunija]]'' by Teona Strugar Mitevska
* '''Panorama''': ''[[Buoyancy (film)|Buoyancy]]'' by [[Rodd Rathjen]]
** '''Special Mention''': ''[[Midnight Traveler]]'' by Hassan Fazili and Emelie Mahdavian
